action: Reject provenance whose build type or external invocation parameters differ from an explicit reviewed expectation set.

progress.finding: Authenticated builder identity is insufficient when buildType or externalParameters permit unintended invocation behavior; reject unknown, missing, or changed parameters by default.
progress.verification: 4 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime; committed module was fetched and inspected.

handoff: Cloudflare Research should compose this evaluator after cryptographic verification and trusted-builder identity checks. Define exact expected buildType and externalParameters in reviewed source; a passing result still does not establish claim truth.
